shellCommands.command:
SERVER_PORT=3333 java -jar target/*.jar &
sleep 6
echo "--- Test 1: GET / (no name) ---"
curl -s http://localhost:3333/
echo ""
echo "--- Test 2: GET /?name=Alice ---"
curl -s http://localhost:3333/?name=Alice
echo ""
echo "--- Test 3: GET /?name=+++Bob+++ (trimmed) ---"
curl -s "http://localhost:3333/?name=%20%20Bob%20%20"
echo ""
echo "--- Test 4: GET /?name= (empty name defaults) ---"
curl -s http://localhost:3333/?name=
echo ""
echo "--- Test 5: GET /nonexistent (404 expected) ---"
curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:3333/nonexistent
echo ""
kill %1 2>/dev/null

SERVER_PORT=3000 java -jar /home/user/workspace/dst/target/*.jar &
sleep 5
curl -s http://localhost:3000/
echo ""
curl -s "http://localhost:3000/?name=  Test  "
echo ""
kill %1 2>/dev/null

SERVER_PORT=3000 java -jar target/*.jar &
sleep 5
echo "=== Test: no name ==="
curl -s http://localhost:3000/
echo ""
echo "=== Test: with trimmed name ==="
curl -s "http://localhost:3000/?name=%20%20Test%20%20"
echo ""
kill %1 2>/dev/null
wait 2>/dev/null
